summary: ESNI Management | Media ID | Screen Loads and Displays Data Correctly
description: Verify ESNI Management screen loads and displays data correctly
gherkin:
When the user navigates to the "ESNI Management" page using the Home screen or the left sidebar menu
Then the "Date" filter should be visible at the top
And the default date should be today's date or the most recent data
And the "Search" input field should be visible on the top-right of the screen
And the "View" button should be visible next to the "Search" input field, on the far right
And the data table should be visible with columns:
* Media ID
* Game PK
* Feed Type
* Media Type
And each row in the table should display valid values for all columns
And each row should have a "Media Details" button (three-line icon) on the far right
And pagination controls should be visible at the bottom of the table

steps.action: *When* the user navigates to the "ESNI Management" page using the Home screen or the left sidebar menu
steps.result:
*Then* the "Date" filter should be visible at the top

*And* the default date should be today's date or the most recent data

*And* the "Search" input field should be visible on the top-right of the screen

*And* the "View" button should be visible next to the "Search" input field, on the far right

*And* the data table should be visible with columns:

* Media ID
* Game PK
* Feed Type
* Media Type

*And* each row in the table should display valid values for all columns

*And* each row should have a "Media Details" button (three-line icon) on the far right

*And* pagination controls should be visible at the bottom of the table
